title: stellularia media
intro: Stellularia media, also known as Chrysocoma ciliata, is a small, flowering plant native to South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stellularia media include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Stellularia media is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and capsules, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
